Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

No defect here. Code could be cleaned in the meantime. I like that this big function is splitted and shrink however, I prefer that new function are directly introduced by the patch that need them.

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

> (1 comment)
 > 
 > No defect here. Code could be cleaned in the meantime. I like that
 > this big function is splitted and shrink however, I prefer that new
 > function are directly introduced by the patch that need them.

The next patch in the series is using it. I split it in two because it's easier to review.

parents.subject: LU-9995 lfsck: keep the LMV_HASH_FLAG_DEAD flag

commit.subject: LU-7988 hsm: split mdt_hsm_add_actions()
commit.message:
LU-7988 hsm: split mdt_hsm_add_actions()

Split a portion of mdt_hsm_add_actions() to the new function
mdt_hsm_process_hal() in order to re-use it in a subsequent patch.

Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Change-Id: I32785c549a744592d4e84787fd16d12e7ffd7322
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/20272
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Quentin Bouget <quentin.bouget@cea.fr>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
